title: Malty Springy Molcajete Pita Rolls
description: A solo-dinner British dish featuring pita bread stuffed with a malty springy filling that is both macrobiotic-friendly and vessel=molcajete.
instructions: Cook macaroni in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a pan, sauté garlic in olive oil for 1 minute or until fragrant.
Add cooked macaroni to the pan with minced garlic and stir well.
Mix in soy sauce and miso paste thoroughly. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold in sesame seeds and mix gently.
Dip pita bread slices into the malty springy mixture, allowing excess to drip off.
Roll up the dipped pita bread into a roll shape.
Serve immediately as a snack or appetizer.
